title: sideritis villosa subsp. gossypina
intro: Sideritis villosa subsp. gossypina, also known as Spanish chamomile or Manzanilla, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic properties, which have been shown to exhibit medicinal properties that can help in treating various health issues. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, making it a popular choice for herbal teas and preparations. Sideritis villosa subsp. gossypina can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
